prompt: The wire-exit channels are currently modelled as solid protruding tubes outside the sleeve, making the part 54 mm wide instead of the intended 30 mm OD. Replace each external tube with a Ø4 mm cylindrical hole CUT into the existing sleeve wall, angled 30 degrees downward, connecting the respective embed pocket to the outer cylindrical surface of the sleeve. The final outer envelope must be a 30 mm OD cylinder of height 24 mm — no protrusions. Keep the ERM and solenoid pockets as before.
original_source_code:
/*
Generated by Text-to-CAD:
A thin-walled cylindrical sleeve that slips over a 24 mm OD tube near its dispense end. Sleeve inner diameter 24.2 mm, outer diameter 30 mm, height 24 mm. On one side cut a circular blind pocket 11 mm diameter and 3.6 mm deep for an ERM disc vibration motor. On the diametrically opposite side cut a rectangular blind pocket 12 mm × 9 mm × 19 mm deep for a tubular push-pull solenoid. Both pockets must connect to the outside of the sleeve via a Ø4 mm wire-exit channel angled downward 30°. Do NOT cut through to the bore. Do NOT add a hopper or any other opening.
*/

@settings(defaultLengthUnit = mm)

sleeveColor = "#6f806d"

sleeveInnerDiameter = 24.2mm
sleeveOuterDiameter = 30mm
sleeveHeight = 24mm
sleeveInnerRadius = sleeveInnerDiameter / 2
sleeveOuterRadius = sleeveOuterDiameter / 2
wallMidRadius = (sleeveInnerRadius + sleeveOuterRadius) / 2

motorPocketDiameter = 11mm
motorPocketDepth = 3.6mm
motorBossDiameter = 15.6mm
motorBossRootX = 13mm
motorBossFrontX = 19.6mm
motorBossProtrusion = motorBossFrontX - motorBossRootX
motorPocketFrontX = motorBossFrontX + 0.05mm
motorPocketCutDepth = motorPocketDepth + 0.05mm

solenoidPocketWidth = 12mm
solenoidPocketHeight = 9mm
solenoidPocketDepth = 19mm
solenoidBossWidth = 16mm
solenoidBossHeight = 14mm
solenoidBossRootX = -13mm
solenoidBossFrontX = -34.6mm
solenoidBossProtrusion = solenoidBossRootX - solenoidBossFrontX
solenoidPocketFrontX = solenoidBossFrontX - 0.05mm
solenoidPocketCutDepth = solenoidPocketDepth + 0.05mm

wireExitDiameter = 4mm
wireExitLengthMotor = 5.8mm
wireExitLengthSolenoid = 22mm

sleeveSketch = sketch(on = XY) {
  outerCircle = circle(start = [var 15mm, var 0mm], center = [var 0mm, var 0mm])
  innerCircle = circle(start = [var 12.1mm, var 0mm], center = [var 0mm, var 0mm])
  outerGuide = line(start = [var 0mm, var 0mm], end = [var 15mm, var 0mm], construction = true)
  innerGuide = line(start = [var 0mm, var 0mm], end = [var 12.1mm, var 0mm], construction = true)
  wallPoint = point(at = [var 13.55mm, var 0mm])

  coincident([outerCircle.center, ORIGIN])
  coincident([innerCircle.center, ORIGIN])
  coincident([outerGuide.start, outerCircle.center])
  coincident([outerGuide.end, outerCircle.start])
  coincident([innerGuide.start, innerCircle.center])
  coincident([innerGuide.end, innerCircle.start])
  horizontal(outerGuide)
  horizontal(innerGuide)
  diameter(outerCircle) == sleeveOuterDiameter
  diameter(innerCircle) == sleeveInnerDiameter
  horizontalDistance([wallPoint, ORIGIN]) == wallMidRadius
  verticalDistance([wallPoint, ORIGIN]) == 0mm
}
sleeveRegion = region(point = sleeveSketch.wallPoint)
sleeveTube = extrude(sleeveRegion, length = sleeveHeight, symmetric = true)
hide(sleeveSketch)

motorBossPlane = {
  origin = [motorBossRootX, 0mm, 0mm],
  xAxis = [0.0, 1.0, 0.0],
  yAxis = [0.0, 0.0, 1.0]
}
motorBossSketch = sketch(on = motorBossPlane) {
  bossCircle = circle(start = [var 7.8mm, var 0mm], center = [var 0mm, var 0mm])
  bossGuide = line(start = [var 0mm, var 0mm], end = [var 7.8mm, var 0mm], construction = true)

  coincident([bossCircle.center, ORIGIN])
  coincident([bossGuide.start, bossCircle.center])
  coincident([bossGuide.end, bossCircle.start])
  horizontal(bossGuide)
  diameter(bossCircle) == motorBossDiameter
}
motorBossRegion = region(point = motorBossSketch.bossCircle.center)
motorBoss = extrude(motorBossRegion, length = motorBossProtrusion)
hide(motorBossSketch)

solenoidBossPlane = {
  origin = [solenoidBossRootX, 0mm, 0mm],
  xAxis = [0.0, 1.0, 0.0],
  yAxis = [0.0, 0.0, 1.0]
}
solenoidBossSketch = sketch(on = solenoidBossPlane) {
  bossBottom = line(start = [var -8mm, var -7mm], end = [var 8mm, var -7mm])
  bossRight = line(start = [var 8mm, var -7mm], end = [var 8mm, var 7mm])
  bossTop = line(start = [var 8mm, var 7mm], end = [var -8mm, var 7mm])
  bossLeft = line(start = [var -8mm, var 7mm], end = [var -8mm, var -7mm])

  coincident([bossBottom.end, bossRight.start])
  coincident([bossRight.end, bossTop.start])
  coincident([bossTop.end, bossLeft.start])
  coincident([bossLeft.end, bossBottom.start])
  coincident([bossBottom.start, [-8mm, -7mm]])
  horizontal(bossBottom)
  vertical(bossRight)
  horizontal(bossTop)
  vertical(bossLeft)
  distance([bossBottom.start, bossBottom.end]) == solenoidBossWidth
  distance([bossRight.start, bossRight.end]) == solenoidBossHeight
}
solenoidBossRegion = region(point = [0mm, 0mm], sketch = solenoidBossSketch)
solenoidBoss = extrude(solenoidBossRegion, length = -solenoidBossProtrusion)
hide(solenoidBossSketch)

motorPocketPlane = {
  origin = [motorPocketFrontX, 0mm, 0mm],
  xAxis = [0.0, 1.0, 0.0],
  yAxis = [0.0, 0.0, -1.0]
}
motorPocketSketch = sketch(on = motorPocketPlane) {
  pocketCircle = circle(start = [var 5.5mm, var 0mm], center = [var 0mm, var 0mm])
  pocketGuide = line(start = [var 0mm, var 0mm], end = [var 5.5mm, var 0mm], construction = true)

  coincident([pocketCircle.center, ORIGIN])
  coincident([pocketGuide.start, pocketCircle.center])
  coincident([pocketGuide.end, pocketCircle.start])
  horizontal(pocketGuide)
  diameter(pocketCircle) == motorPocketDiameter
}
motorPocketRegion = region(point = motorPocketSketch.pocketCircle.center)
motorPocketCutter = extrude(motorPocketRegion, length = motorPocketCutDepth)
hide(motorPocketSketch)

solenoidPocketPlane = {
  origin = [solenoidPocketFrontX, 0mm, 0mm],
  xAxis = [0.0, 1.0, 0.0],
  yAxis = [0.0, 0.0, 1.0]
}
solenoidPocketSketch = sketch(on = solenoidPocketPlane) {
  pocketBottom = line(start = [var -6mm, var -4.5mm], end = [var 6mm, var -4.5mm])
  pocketRight = line(start = [var 6mm, var -4.5mm], end = [var 6mm, var 4.5mm])
  pocketTop = line(start = [var 6mm, var 4.5mm], end = [var -6mm, var 4.5mm])
  pocketLeft = line(start = [var -6mm, var 4.5mm], end = [var -6mm, var -4.5mm])

  coincident([pocketBottom.end, pocketRight.start])
  coincident([pocketRight.end, pocketTop.start])
  coincident([pocketTop.end, pocketLeft.start])
  coincident([pocketLeft.end, pocketBottom.start])
  coincident([pocketBottom.start, [-6mm, -4.5mm]])
  horizontal(pocketBottom)
  vertical(pocketRight)
  horizontal(pocketTop)
  vertical(pocketLeft)
  distance([pocketBottom.start, pocketBottom.end]) == solenoidPocketWidth
  distance([pocketRight.start, pocketRight.end]) == solenoidPocketHeight
}
solenoidPocketRegion = region(point = [0mm, 0mm], sketch = solenoidPocketSketch)
solenoidPocketCutter = extrude(solenoidPocketRegion, length = solenoidPocketCutDepth)
hide(solenoidPocketSketch)

motorWirePlane = {
  origin = [16.4mm, 0mm, -4mm],
  xAxis = [0.0, 1.0, 0.0],
  yAxis = [0.5, 0.0, 0.8660254]
}
motorWireSketch = sketch(on = motorWirePlane) {
  wireCircle = circle(start = [var 2mm, var 0mm], center = [var 0mm, var 0mm])
  wireGuide = line(start = [var 0mm, var 0mm], end = [var 2mm, var 0mm], construction = true)

  coincident([wireCircle.center, ORIGIN])
  coincident([wireGuide.start, wireCircle.center])
  coincident([wireGuide.end, wireCircle.start])
  horizontal(wireGuide)
  diameter(wireCircle) == wireExitDiameter
}
motorWireRegion = region(point = motorWireSketch.wireCircle.center)
motorWireCutter = extrude(motorWireRegion, length = wireExitLengthMotor)
hide(motorWireSketch)

solenoidWirePlane = {
  origin = [-16.2mm, 0mm, -3mm],
  xAxis = [0.0, 1.0, 0.0],
  yAxis = [0.5, 0.0, -0.8660254]
}
solenoidWireSketch = sketch(on = solenoidWirePlane) {
  wireCircle = circle(start = [var 2mm, var 0mm], center = [var 0mm, var 0mm])
  wireGuide = line(start = [var 0mm, var 0mm], end = [var 2mm, var 0mm], construction = true)

  coincident([wireCircle.center, ORIGIN])
  coincident([wireGuide.start, wireCircle.center])
  coincident([wireGuide.end, wireCircle.start])
  horizontal(wireGuide)
  diameter(wireCircle) == wireExitDiameter
}
solenoidWireRegion = region(point = solenoidWireSketch.wireCircle.center)
solenoidWireCutter = extrude(solenoidWireRegion, length = wireExitLengthSolenoid)
hide(solenoidWireSketch)

motorTools = concat(motorPocketCutter, items = motorWireCutter)
solenoidTools = concat(solenoidPocketCutter, items = solenoidWireCutter)
motorBossWithPocket = subtract(motorBoss, tools = motorTools)
solenoidBossWithPocket = subtract(solenoidBoss, tools = solenoidTools)

sleeveSolids = concat(sleeveTube, items = concat(motorBossWithPocket, items = solenoidBossWithPocket))
pocketedSleeve = appearance(sleeveSolids, color = sleeveColor, roughness = 85)

source_ranges.prompt: The wire-exit channels are currently modelled as solid protruding tubes outside the sleeve, making the part 54 mm wide instead of the intended 30 mm OD. Replace each external tube with a Ø4 mm cylindrical hole CUT into the existing sleeve wall, angled 30 degrees downward, connecting the respective embed pocket to the outer cylindrical surface of the sleeve. The final outer envelope must be a 30 mm OD cylinder of height 24 mm — no protrusions. Keep the ERM and solenoid pockets as before.
